subcodes.first_line: O thou steadfast in the Covenant! Thy tribulations and adversities are well known and evident in the sight of 'Abdu'l-Bahá; thy patience and fortitude [are manifest] [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان زحمات و مشقاتت در نزد عبدالبهاء معلوم و مشهود تحمل و اصطبار
subcodes.subjects: @martyrs and martyrdom, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @suffering and imprisonment
